title: JeanSebastienBash/PromptDeMerde

title: LearningCircuit/local-deep-research
summary: ~95% on SimpleQA (e.g. Qwen3.6-27B on a 3090). Supports all local and cloud LLMs (llama.cpp, Ollama, Google, ...). 10+ search engines - arXiv, PubMed, your private documents. Everything Local & Encrypted.

title: jrodolfo/local-genai-lab
summary: Local-first GenAI lab with a React frontend and Spring Boot backend, supporting Ollama, Amazon Bedrock, Hugging Face, RAG document retrieval, MCP-backed AWS tools, streaming chat, persistent sessions, and artifact/report workflows.

title: DuckTapeKiller/dive
summary: Dive is a secure, local-first desktop client for Ollama and Pi agentic AI. Features an ultra-compact offline RAG engine for indexing massive book libraries, MCP tool integration, sandboxed custom skills, PDF extraction, and macOS daemon support.

title: marcimastro98/Xenon
summary: A 100% local, all-in-one dashboard for the CORSAIR Xeneon Edge (and any Windows browser). System monitor, media & mic, a voice AI that can build dashboard pages for you, a Stream-Deck grid, RGB lighting, and Twitch/OBS control. Free, open-source, no account.

title: liteshperumalla/Smart-Tutor-AI-AI-Driven-Personalized-Teaching-Support
summary: With the rise of digital learning platforms, students rely on search engines and LLMs for quick information. However, these tools often return irrelevant results. Smart Tutor AI (STA) bridges this gap by providing professor-validated course materials, ensuring students receive precise and relevant content.

title: fasih09/Cyberbot_-Uncensored-Offline-chatbot-
summary: **CyberBot** is a fully offline AI-powered cybersecurity assistant built with Python, PyQt6, Ollama, and SQLite. It provides private, local AI chat capabilities for penetration testers, security analysts, CTF players, and cybersecurity students. All conversations remain on the user's machine, with no cloud services, API keys, or internet connection
